title: Nginx ACME Challenge Example
summary: Expose the ACME HTTP-01 challenge path in Nginx.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Configure a working HTTPS server for the same host names before validation.
Ensure the Nginx worker user and any host security policy can read the configured challenge directory before validation.
Point the alias path at a real ACME challenge directory before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example uses standard Nginx location, alias, and return directives, but it still requires nginx -t, a real challenge file, and a working HTTPS server on a staging host before use.
